title: Halloween Texture Pack Redux
description: A rendition of the Legacy Console Halloween texture-pack.
body:
## Summary

This resource pack is exactly what you think it is, the legendary halloween texture pack used on all major consoles back in the day. 

This particular port plans to add exclusive textures that fit the overall theme; you may notice some already such as parodies of hollywood killers for the Nether mobs!


## Features

- Added fog/sky support for biomes o plenty mod.
- Added fog/sky support for terrestria mod.
- Added custom mob models for mobs such as piglin and piglin brute.

## Credits
All credits to [pastelbranches](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pastelbranches/) over on planetminecraft!
